module.name: Busbar SF CLI
module.blurb: Run a Salesforce CLI action inside a managed kernel-enforced capability sandbox.
module.longDescription: Installs a version-pinned Salesforce CLI into a controlled prefix, then executes a single declarative Salesforce CLI action under a minimal, per-action capability manifest enforced by the OS kernel (Landlock on Linux runners). Confines filesystem and network access to only what the action needs, and emits a tamper-evident audit record of the granted capabilities and outcome.
